{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Valin's bow
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Valin's bow]] can shoot arrows made of pure white light.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
